number question number one is based on

can use that information immediately

question number three which is my
absolute favorite question to ask in any
job interview but question number three
is if you were to give me an offer and I
was to accept it a year from from now
what will I have done
specifically that you would consider
this hire a raging success or hugely
successful the reason that that's such a
great question is it gets the

successful it gives you that Clarity to

how you will accomplish what they

like to ask is if you were to give me an

it's really great it puts the

it's usually a negative surprise just

so that's question number four and then

asked question number three which was
